sourceDir.description: The source directory of your TypeScript plugin.

targetDir.description: The target directory of transpilation output.

themeDir.description: The directory of your theme components. If the directory is not present, we assume that no theme components are present.

themeTargetDir.description: The directory to output the human-readable JS components.

ignore.description: A list of patterns to be ignored—no compilation output will be emitted.
